```
    public static int hash(
            int initialNonZeroOddNumber, int multiplierNonZeroOddNumber, Object... objs) {
        int result = initialNonZeroOddNumber;
        for (Object obj : objs) {
            result = multiplierNonZeroOddNumber * result + (obj != null ? obj.hashCode() : 0);
        }
        return result;
    }
```
